VERY IMPORTANT MESSAGE !!

Dear Followers,

I want to take a moment to apologize for not posting new bots recently. The current situation in Syria has been challenging, and it has deeply affected my ability to focus and create as I usually would.

These are difficult times for many, and like countless others, I’ve been processing the pain and uncertainty caused by these events. I truly appreciate your understanding and patience during this period.

Your support means so much to me, and I promise I’ll do my best to bring you the content you love as soon as I can. Thank you for standing with me and for showing kindness in moments like these.

Sending love and strength to everyone affected.

⊹+ ̊‧(‿+୨୧+‿(‧ ̊ +⊹
